ab: ti asing nangan na tama ku.
ti ipay nangan na tina ku.
yau paqenanem qaqa ku, ti buya nangan na, Rabetin yau ussiq ti tasaw na.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫buya，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is buya, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: aiku seRay qaqa ku nizu melizaq satezay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: melizaq iku menanguy, azu yau hibang, matiw imi saleppawan menanguy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: melizaq iku menanam tu tasu ay kaput, nengi imi matapun satezay seRay menanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
